title: Cohesive Block Sounds
description: Changes most new 1.13+ block sound effects to the basic few iconic sound samples of Minecraft.
body:
A small, simple resource pack that replaces the sound effects of most blocks added since 1.13 to use the basic few iconic sound samples of Minecraft.
